svg.title: FX order flow — placement to execution
svg.desc: Full sequence from client placing order through validation, pre-trade risk, matching engine, to fill or rejection. Includes partial fill path.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a PlaceOrderCommand look like as a Java record?')
sendPrompt('What does Order Validation check — format, lot size, supported symbols?')
sendPrompt('What validation errors should immediately reject an FX order?')
sendPrompt('What does pre-trade risk check validate — margin, position limits, buying power?')
sendPrompt('How do you persist a PENDING order and reserve margin atomically?')
sendPrompt('How does the matching engine work — price-time priority, TreeMap bid/ask sides?')
sendPrompt('What happens when no counter-party found — GTC waits, IOC/FOK cancelled immediately?')
sendPrompt('How does partial fill work — executedQty, remainingQty, PARTIALLY_FILLED status?')
sendPrompt('What does a trade record contain — orderId, pair, executedQty, executedPrice, timestamp?')
sendPrompt('What does OrderFilledEvent contain and how is it structured for Kafka?')
